What We Offer

Our Service Areas

Carefully vetted professionals for every need.

👶

Nanny & Caregiver

100% English-speaking professional nannies and caregivers. Background-checked, referenced, and experienced with children and infants.

📄 Code of Conduct Apply Now →
🏥

Elder Care Specialist

Compassionate, reliable 7/24 elder care and home health aides. Trained in patient care, mobility support, and companionship.

📄 Code of Conduct Apply Now →
🏨

Hospitality & Hotel Staff

5-star trained hospitality professionals for hotels, resorts, and tourism operations. Front desk, housekeeping, F&B, and more.

The Process

How It Works

Simple, transparent, and fully managed from Kenya to Turkey.

1

Submit Request

Tell us your needs — role, requirements, timeline and preferences.

2

Candidate Matching

We screen and match qualified candidates from our verified talent pool.

3

Visa & Legal

We handle all work permit and visa processes — fully legal and transparent.

4

Placement & Support

Staff arrives ready to work. We provide ongoing support for both parties.

Eligibility

Position Requirements

What we look for in each role.

👶 Nanny / Caregiver

  • Fluent English (spoken & written)
  • Minimum 2 years childcare experience
  • First Aid certification preferred
  • Clean background check
  • 2+ verifiable references
📄 Code of Conduct Apply Now →

🏥 Elder Care Specialist

  • Fluent English communication
  • Experience with elderly / disabled patients
  • Nursing or caregiving certificate
  • Patient, empathetic personality
  • Availability for live-in positions
📄 Code of Conduct Apply Now →

🏨 Hospitality Staff

  • Excellent English, Turkish a plus
  • Hotel or tourism sector experience
  • Professional appearance & conduct
  • Food & Beverage or Front Desk skills
  • Flexibility for shift work
📄 Code of Conduct Apply Now →
